title: Mukhyamantri Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana
description: Financial assistance of ₹1,500 per month for eligible women in Maharashtra to ensure economic independence.
eligibilityCriteria: Women aged 21-65 years, family income < ₹2.5 Lakh/year.

title: Namo Shetkari Maha Samman Nidhi Yojana
description: Additional financial aid of ₹6,000 per year for farmers in Maharashtra, supplementing the PM-Kisan scheme.
eligibilityCriteria: Farmers registered under PM-Kisan scheme.

title: Mukhyamantri Ladli Behna Yojana
description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,250 to women to improve their nutritional and health status.
eligibilityCriteria: Married/Divorced/Widowed women aged 21-60, no tax-paying family member.

title: Mukhyamantri Seekho Kamao Yojana
description: Earn while you learn scheme providing stipends to youth for skill training.
eligibilityCriteria: Youth aged 18-29, 12th pass/ITI/Diploma/Degree.

title: Gruha Lakshmi Scheme
description: Financial assistance of ₹2,000 per month to the woman head of the family in Karnataka.
eligibilityCriteria: Woman recognized as head of family on Antyodaya, BPL or APL card.

title: Yuva Nidhi Scheme
description: Unemployment allowance of ₹3,000/month for graduates and ₹1,500/month for diploma holders.
eligibilityCriteria: Graduated in 2022/2023, unemployed for 6 months.

title: Mahalakshmi Scheme
description: Monthly financial aid of ₹2,500 to eligible women, gas cylinders at ₹500, and free bus travel.
eligibilityCriteria: Women belonging to BPL families.

title: Rythu Bandhu Scheme
description: Investment support for agriculture at ₹5,000 per acre per season to farmers.
eligibilityCriteria: Land-owning farmers in Telangana.

title: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana
description: Financial support to families with a girl child, provided in six phases from birth to graduation.
eligibilityCriteria: Family income < ₹3 Lakh/year, maximum 2 girls per family.

title: UP Free Smartphone Yojana
description: Distribution of free smartphones/tablets to students to facilitate digital learning.
eligibilityCriteria: Students enrolled in graduation, post-graduation, or diploma courses.

title: Indira Gandhi Free Smartphone Yojana
description: Free smartphones with internet connectivity for women heads of families.
eligibilityCriteria: Women covered under Chiranjeevi Yojana.

title: Mukhyamantri Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima
description: Universal health insurance providing cashless treatment up to ₹25 Lakhs.
eligibilityCriteria: All families in Rajasthan (free for eligible categories, ₹850 premium for others).

title: Lakshmir Bhandar
description: Basic income support for female heads of families. ₹1,200 for SC/ST and ₹1,000 for general category.
eligibilityCriteria: Women aged 25-60 not holding permanent govt jobs.

title: Kanyashree Prakalpa
description: Annual scholarship for unmarried girls aged 13-18 and a one-time grant upon reaching 18 to prevent early marriage.
eligibilityCriteria: Unmarried girls enrolled in school/college.

title: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
description: Central scheme providing up to 300 units of free electricity every month via rooftop solar subsidies.
eligibilityCriteria: Indian citizens with a suitable roof, valid electricity connection.

title: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: End-to-end support for artisans and craftspeople including toolkit incentives and collateral-free credit.
eligibilityCriteria: Artisan working in specified 18 trades, minimum age 18.

title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families.
eligibilityCriteria: Small and marginal farmers holding cultivable land.

title: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam
description: Financial assistance of ₹1,000 per month for women heads of eligible households.
eligibilityCriteria: Women head of families with annual income < ₹2.5 Lakh.

title: Pudhumai Penn Scheme
description: Financial assistance of ₹1,000/month to girl students who studied in govt schools from classes 6 to 12 until graduation.
eligibilityCriteria: Girl students pursuing higher education from govt schools.

title: Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana
description: Grant of ₹10 Lakhs (50% subsidy, 50% interest-free loan) to promote self-employment among youth.
eligibilityCriteria: Youth belonging to SC/ST/EBC/Women with 12th/ITI qualification.

title: Bihar Student Credit Card
description: Education loan up to ₹4 Lakhs at a nominal interest rate (1% for women/disabled, 4% for others).
eligibilityCriteria: 12th pass students pursuing higher education.

title: Aam Aadmi Clinics & Free Electricity
description: 300 units of free electricity per month and free primary healthcare.
eligibilityCriteria: All residents holding a domestic electricity connection.

title: Mo Ghara Yojana
description: Credit-linked housing scheme to assist lower and middle-income families in rural areas.
eligibilityCriteria: Rural households in Odisha not holding pucca houses.

title: Subhadra Yojana
description: Financial assistance voucher of ₹50,000 for women empowerment initiatives.
eligibilityCriteria: Women in Odisha.

title: Orunodoi Scheme
description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,250 transferred directly to female heads of marginalized households.
eligibilityCriteria: Widows, unmarried women, or women with differently-abled members in family.

title: Mukhyamantri Atmanirbhar Asom
description: Financial support of ₹2 Lakhs in installments to unemployed youth for entrepreneurship.
eligibilityCriteria: Unemployed youth aged 28-40 with specific educational criteria.

title: Mahtari Vandana Yojana
description: Annual financial aid of ₹12,000 (₹1,000/month) to married women.
eligibilityCriteria: Married women above 21 years of age.

title: Krishak Unnati Yojana
description: Procurement of paddy at an elevated MSP to boost farmer income.
eligibilityCriteria: Registered farmers selling paddy to state societies.

title: Mukhyamantri Maiyan Samman Yojana
description: Financial assistance of ₹1,000 per month for vulnerable women.
eligibilityCriteria: Women aged 21-50 from poor families.

title: Abua Awas Yojana
description: State-sponsored housing scheme to build 3-room pucca houses for the poor.
eligibilityCriteria: Homeless families or those living in kutcha houses.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, basic savings & deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, pension in an affordable manner.
eligibilityCriteria: Any Indian citizen aged 10 years and above who does not have any other bank account.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY-U)
description: Housing for All initiative providing a pucca house to eligible urban households with a huge interest subsidy on home loans.
eligibilityCriteria: Families with annual income up to ₹18 Lakhs, must not own a pucca house anywhere in India.

title: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides loans up to ₹10 Lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises without collateral.
eligibilityCriteria: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for a non-farm sector income-generating activity.

title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Provides LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.
eligibilityCriteria: Applicant must be a woman aged above 18, belonging to SC/ST/BPL households.

title: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing ₹5 Lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
eligibilityCriteria: Based on SECC 2011 deprivation and occupational criteria in rural and urban areas.

title: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 Lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch.
eligibilityCriteria: SC/ST and/or woman entrepreneurs, above 18 years of age, setting up a greenfield enterprise.

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme protecting farmers against non-preventable natural risks.
eligibilityCriteria: All farmers growing notified crops in a notified area, including sharecroppers.

title: Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM)
description: Aims to provide safe and adequate drinking water through individual household tap connections to all rural households.
eligibilityCriteria: Any rural household currently without a functional tap connection.

title: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Guaranteed pension scheme primarily aimed at the unorganized sector workers.
eligibilityCriteria: Indian citizens aged 18 to 40 years holding a savings bank account.

title: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan (Gramin)
description: Financial incentive to BPL/APL households for the construction of individual household latrines (IHHL).
eligibilityCriteria: BPL households and restricted categories of APL households.
